name: frigate-notify
tagline: A notification service for forwarding camera events and alerts from Frigate
description: Frigate Notify is a companion tool for sending Frigate camera events into platforms like Apprise or SMS. It supports event triggers, notifications, and media previews for users running local security stacks.

features.title: Frigate Event Notifications
features.description: Send notifications based on Frigate detection events

features.title: Multiple Notification Channels
features.description: Deliver alerts via supported messaging services

features.title: Event Filtering
features.description: Filter notifications by camera, object, or event type

features.title: Integration Configuration
features.description: Configure notification behavior through settings files

features.title: Self-Hosted Deployment
features.description: Run the notification service alongside Frigate
